event: View of the Moscow Kremlin from the Cathedral of Christ the Saviour
description: A panoramic view of Moscow seen from an elevated vantage point. The Moscow River curves through the center of the composition, its surface reflecting muted blues and greens. Along the near bank, a wide tree-lined embankment stretches diagonally, with small figures strolling. Across the river, the Kremlin complex rises with its red walls, towers, golden domes, and spires. A stone bridge spans the river at center-right. The sky above is deep blue with expressive, thick brushwork.

_meta.title: Kremlin view from Cathedral of Christ the Saviour
